title: Rights of a shareholder dissenting from certain corporate actions
doc_html:
§131.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Amended by Acts 1970, No. 50, §12, emerg. eff. June 18, 1970, at 5:05 P.M; Acts 1975, No. 433, §1; Acts 1993, No. 983, §1, eff. June 25, 1993; Acts 1997, No. 914, §1; Acts 2010, No. 7, §2, eff. May 19, 2010; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
